contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: PR2 — Public-Key Lookup Cache: incremental per-key write via manifest diff
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/361
  
  Details:
  PR2 of PUBLIC_KEY_LOOKUP_CACHE_PLAN.md. Builds on PR1 (#359, merged).
  
  Implements incremental write:
  - Fetches current _manifest.json from treasury-cache (handles 404 for first run)
  - Diffs current ACTIVE keys against manifest — only creates blobs for changed/added keys
  - Keys no longer ACTIVE → writes status:"REVOKED" and drops from manifest
  - Populates manifest with key set for future diffs
  - If nothing changed, skips the commit entirely (no-op)
  - dao_members.json always written (canonical snapshot)
- Contributor(s): Sophia Truesight
- TDG Issued: 0
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
